mapper.select: SELECT * FROM knowledge_base WHERE status = 1 AND deleted = 0 AND (keywords LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR question LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR answer LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY sort ASC, id ASC
SELECT * FROM knowledge_base WHERE category = #{category} AND status = 1 AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort ASC, id ASC
SELECT * FROM knowledge_base WHERE is_danger = 1 AND status = 1 AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort ASC, id ASC
SELECT * FROM knowledge_base WHERE device_id = #{deviceId} AND status = 1 AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort ASC, id ASC
